The real issue is that the solution file is missing `ProjectConfigurationPlatforms` entries in the `Global` section. Without those, MSBuild doesn't know which projects to build in which configurations. Let me check this more carefully.

The solution file has `SolutionConfigurationPlatforms` but no `ProjectConfigurationPlatforms`. That's why MSBuild is skipping all projects during the Build target — it doesn't have the configuration mapping for any of them.
